actions.description: [Uniqueness] Title not unique: 2 page(s) affected. Health potential: +5pts.

payload.description: Page's title should not be similar to other Page titles on your website.
payload.learn_why: Indexable pages that are not part of a pagination sequence or hreflang group should have a unique page title. This is to avoid confusing search engines in deciding which page to display for the keywords you incorporate.

actions.reasoning: Site audit found 'Title not unique' affecting 2 pages. Category: Uniqueness. Severity: error. Fixing this could recover 5 health points. Indexable pages that are not part of a pagination sequence or hreflang group should have a unique page title. This is to avoid confusing search engines in deciding which page to display for the keywords you incorporate.

actions.description: [Page URL] Page is orphaned: 3 page(s) affected. Health potential: +5pts.

payload.description: Orphan pages have no links pointing to them and cannot be found or indexed by search engine crawlers.
payload.learn_why: The presence of orphan pages creates for poor site architecture and missed keyword ranking opportunities. Resolving orphan pages can lead to more pages in Google's index and increased total keyword rankings.

actions.reasoning: Site audit found 'Page is orphaned' affecting 3 pages. Category: Page URL. Severity: error. Fixing this could recover 5 health points. The presence of orphan pages creates for poor site architecture and missed keyword ranking opportunities. Resolving orphan pages can lead to more pages in Google's index and increased total keyword rankings.

actions.description: [Uniqueness] H1 heading is not unique: 4 page(s) affected. Health potential: +5pts.

payload.description: Page's H1 heading should be unique and dissimilar to the H1 headings on other pages of your website.
payload.learn_why: Indexable pages that are not part of a pagination sequence or hreflang group should have a unique H1 heading. This is to avoid confusing search engines in deciding which page to display for the keywords you incorporate.

actions.reasoning: Site audit found 'H1 heading is not unique' affecting 4 pages. Category: Uniqueness. Severity: warning. Fixing this could recover 5 health points. Indexable pages that are not part of a pagination sequence or hreflang group should have a unique H1 heading. This is to avoid confusing search engines in deciding which page to display for the keywords you incorporate.

actions.description: [Content] DOM size too large: 4 page(s) affected. Health potential: +3pts.

payload.description: Large DOM sizes hurt performance by making it harder for browsers to render a webpage. Your Page should have a DOM size of less than 1000 elements.
payload.learn_why: The DOM (or Document Object Model), is a programming interface for web documents. An excessive DOM can harm web page performance, and it is recommended that a web page has no more that 1000 elements.

actions.reasoning: Site audit found 'DOM size too large' affecting 4 pages. Category: Content. Severity: notice. Fixing this could recover 3 health points. The DOM (or Document Object Model), is a programming interface for web documents. An excessive DOM can harm web page performance, and it is recommended that a web page has no more that 1000 elements.

actions.description: [Content] Inline style attribute: 11 page(s) affected. Health potential: +3pts.

payload.description: HTML elements should use a .css file for styling, making your HTML cleaner and more maintainable.
payload.learn_why: CSS files are used to style and lay out web pages. They determine how font, colors, spacing, and other HTML elements are displayed on web pages. Google crawls and renders CSS files to understand the content, relevance, and page experience of a web page.

actions.reasoning: Site audit found 'Inline style attribute' affecting 11 pages. Category: Content. Severity: notice. Fixing this could recover 3 health points. Google crawls and renders CSS files to understand the content, relevance, and page experience of a web page.

actions.description: [Content] Empty href attribute in link: 4 page(s) affected. Health potential: +3pts.

payload.description: All links on a page should have an explicit "href" attribute defined to avoid cross-browser compatibility issues and ensure search engines can discover the linked-to pages.
payload.learn_why: The href attribute specifies the url of the page that a link points to. Without the "href", the link will not direct the user to another page

actions.reasoning: Site audit found 'Empty href attribute in link' affecting 4 pages. Category: Content. Severity: notice. Fixing this could recover 3 health points. actions.description: [Content] JS file size too large: 1 page(s) affected. Health potential: +1pts.

payload.description: Avoid using large javascript files, which slow down page load time and hurt performance. Files should be smaller than 300 KB.
payload.learn_why: Search engines have a more difficult time crawling and indexing Javascript, which is why unoptimized javascript files can hurt SEO performance. Any Javascript files should be smaller than 300KB.

actions.reasoning: Site audit found 'JS file size too large' affecting 1 pages. Category: Content. Severity: notice. Fixing this could recover 1 health points. Search engines have a more difficult time crawling and indexing Javascript, which is why unoptimized javascript files can hurt SEO performance. Any Javascript files should be smaller than 300KB.

actions.description: [Page Headers] H1 tag missing or empty: 3 page(s) affected. Health potential: +4pts.

actions.description: [Page Headers] H2 tag doesn't meet length requirements: 4 page(s) affected. Health potential: +1pts.

payload.description: H2 headers should be between 20 and 70 characters.
payload.learn_why: H2 headers should be somewhere between 50 and 70 characters in order for the full heading to be visible on the web page and extracted by search engines for display in the SERPs.
